title: QA: Verify Google Gemini provider implementation
intent: Verify the Google provider makes correct API calls, handles errors properly, and follows the same adapter pattern as Anthropic with no bypass paths.
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify correct Gemini API URL and POST method
Tests verify API key retrieved from secrets adapter (not hardcoded or env var)
Tests verify request body structure matches Gemini API spec
Tests verify response parsing extracts text from candidates correctly
Tests verify non-2xx HTTP status throws explicit error
No regressions in existing provider tests
